limitations: ai_investment_intensity capped at 3: no quantified dollar amounts or multi-year budgets for Duke Energy's own AI infrastructure spend are disclosed in the excerpts; the $10 billion Amazon figure is a customer investment, not Duke Energy capex

ai_narrative_concreteness: the 2.2 million outages avoided metric is attributed to smart self-healing technology broadly, not exclusively to AI; scored 4 rather than 5 due to this ambiguity and lack of direct AI-specific quantified business outcomes

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: risk-factor sections are present and contain company-specific AI risk mechanisms (cybersecurity, vendor/third-party AI, implementation failure, regulatory exposure), supporting score of 4; no quantified risk exposure or formal named AI risk oversight body beyond the ECOG governance structure described
